mapper.insert: INSERT INTO survey (trainer_id, token, owner_name, pet_name, status) VALUES (#{trainerId}, #{token}, #{ownerName}, #{petName}, '미확인')
mapper.update: UPDATE survey SET owner_name = #{ownerName}, owner_phone = #{ownerPhone}, pet_name = #{petName}, breed = #{breed}, age_years = #{ageYears}, gender = #{gender}, neutered = #{neutered}, problem_behavior = #{problemBehavior}, behavior_detail = #{behaviorDetail}, training_goal = #{trainingGoal}, submitted_at = NOW() WHERE token = #{token}
mapper.select: SELECT s.*, m.name AS trainer_name, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ai_analysis a WHERE a.survey_id = s.survey_id) > 0 AS has_ai_analysis, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM training_case tc WHERE tc.survey_id = s.survey_id) > 0 AS has_case_created FROM survey s JOIN member m ON s.trainer_id = m.member_id WHERE s.trainer_id = #{trainerId} AND s.submitted_at IS NOT NULL ORDER BY s.submitted_at DESC

SELECT s.*, m.name AS trainer_name, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ai_analysis a WHERE a.survey_id = s.survey_id) > 0 AS has_ai_analysis, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM training_case tc WHERE tc.survey_id = s.survey_id) > 0 AS has_case_created FROM survey s JOIN member m ON s.trainer_id = m.member_id WHERE s.survey_id = #{surveyId}
SELECT s.*, m.name AS trainer_name FROM survey s JOIN member m ON s.trainer_id = m.member_id WHERE s.token = #{token}
mapper.update: UPDATE survey SET status = #{status} WHERE survey_id = #{surveyId}
UPDATE survey SET pet_id = #{petId} WHERE survey_id = #{surveyId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ai_analysis (survey_id, behavior_type, risk_level, summary, training_direction) VALUES (#{surveyId}, #{behaviorType}, #{riskLevel}, #{summary}, #{trainingDirection})
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM survey WHERE trainer_id = #{trainerId} AND status = '미확인' AND submitted_at IS NOT NULL

SELECT s.*, m.name AS trainer_name FROM survey s JOIN member m ON s.trainer_id = m.member_id WHERE s.trainer_id = #{trainerId} AND s.submitted_at IS NOT NULL ORDER BY s.submitted_at DESC LIMIT #{limit}
